title: dryopteris angustifrons
intro: Dryopteris angustifrons is a species of fern in the Dryopteridaceae family, commonly known as the narrow-leaved buckler fern. It is a perennial plant native to East Asia, known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, with its extracts exhibiting potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In traditional herbal medicine, Dryopteris angustifrons is often prepared as a tea or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
